_meta.description: Annotations — podcast summaries, earnings call notes, analyst interview highlights, and research memos. Keyed to vertical and/or ticker. Add entries chronologically.
_meta.instructions: Each entry has: id (slug), type, date (YYYY-MM-DD), vertical (optional), ticker (optional), title, body, tags[].

annotations.title: System initialization — hard assets research framework
annotations.body: Initial build of the hard assets research system. 13 verticals mapped across 10 value chain stages. Three structural clusters defined: Early Innings (REE inning 1, Nuclear/Uranium inning 2, Electricity/Grid inning 2, Copper inning 2, Tech Metals inning 2, Water/Land inning 2, NG/LNG inning 3), Mid Innings (Li/Battery inning 4, Fertilizers inning 4, Ind. Inputs inning 3, PGMs/Gold/Ag inning 4), and Cycle-Sensitive (Oil inning 5). Defining insight: Nuclear, REE, and Electricity simultaneously at inning 1-2 with highest capex gaps (90, 92, 88) and lowest business cycle risk (<30) — most defensible structural positions in a recessionary environment.
